title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming SMS during update
scenario: Incoming SMS does not interrupt or break Device Firmware Update (DFU) process on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected Poly device.
5. While the DFU is in progress, have an SMS message sent to the Android device.
6. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app and the connected Poly device during and after the SMS is received.
7. Wait for the DFU to complete.
expected: The DFU continues running without interruption and completes successfully. The incoming SMS does not break, pause, or cancel the firmware update process.
